title: Mamma Mia
why_this_song: Mamma Mia by ABBA (1975) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Mamma mia, here I go again"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I've been cheated by you since I don't know when"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I've been cheated by you since I don't know when"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I've been cheated by you since I don't know when"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Look at me now, will I ever learn"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Mamma mia, here I go again
My, my, how can I resist you?
Mamma mia, does it show again
My, my, just how much I've missed you?
Mamma mia, now I really know
My, my, I could never let you go
I've been angry and sad about things that you do
I can't count all the times that I've told you we're through

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "mamma" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "mamma" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "i've" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "i've" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Look at me now, will I ever learn
My, my, I could never let you go
Bye-bye, leave me now or never

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: There's a fire within my soul
Mamma mia, does it show again

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Mamma Mia" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Mamma Mia", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Mamma Mia" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Mamma Mia" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Mamma Mia", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Mamma Mia", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
